title: SQL: inserting multiple values at once can break constraints
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test3 (id UInt32, val String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE test4 (t Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY t;
ALTER TABLE test4 ADD CONSTRAINT test4_t_unique UNIQUE (t);
key_bug_features: Inserting duplicate values violates unique constraints
